data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for location-specific variants.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Location-specific variants where needed', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on creating resources and handling bookings, but they do not address the specific requirement of validating location-specific variants in the status vocabulary as outlined in the use case. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively determined as either satisfied or unsatisfied.
gaps: No evidence of validation for location-specific variants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for location-specific variants.
